label: PASS
rationale: StartSession defines HostSessionID as a uinteger, and SyncSession HostSessionID SHALL be the same as StartSession; 42 and 0000002A represent the same numeric session id.

label: PASS
rationale: StartSession HostSessionID is specified as a uinteger and SyncSession must echo the same value; 0x2A is a numeric uinteger representation of 42, so success with HostSessionID 42 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession requires HostSessionID to be a uinteger and SyncSession must use the same HostSessionID; the nonnumeric text value session-one is not a uinteger, so a successful response echoing it is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession requires HostSessionID to be a uinteger; -1 is negative and therefore not an unsigned integer, so it cannot validly produce a successful SyncSession.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines HostSessionID as a uinteger while Write is the boolean parameter; a boolean HostSessionID is the wrong type, so success echoing true is not protocol-compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: StartTrustedSession is invoked after StartSession and carries HostSessionID and SPSessionID values that match the preceding SyncSession-assigned session identifiers; both parameters are uinteger values.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartTrustedSession requires HostSessionID to be a uinteger and to match the HostSessionID from StartSession; -1 is not a uinteger and does not match the prior 0000002A session id, so success is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartTrustedSession requires HostSessionID to be a uinteger and the same as the StartSession HostSessionID; boolean true is not the required uinteger session number, so success is invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartTrustedSession requires SPSessionID to be a uinteger and to be the TPer-assigned value delivered in SyncSession; -1 is not a uinteger and does not match 0000002B, so success is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartTrustedSession requires SPSessionID to be a uinteger and the TPer-assigned SPSessionID from SyncSession; boolean true is not that uinteger value, so a successful result is not compliant.
